title: correlated update query causes assertion failure
poc: create table a (x clob, y clob);
create table b (x clob, y clob);
update a set y = (select y from b where a.x = b.x and a.y = '' and b.y <> '');
key_bug_features: correlated update with empty string condition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (x clob, y clob NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE b (x clob, y clob DEFAULT 'default');
UPDATE a SET y = (SELECT y FROM b WHERE a.x = b.x AND a.y = '' AND b.y <> '');
